title: fix(auth): harden github username sync on login
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Hello, my new name is...
gist.blurb: Fixed a quiet little bug that was ignoring your shiny new GitHub username. The hive now properly respects your rebrand.
gist.summary: Hardened the authentication sync logic to reliably detect and update GitHub username changes upon login.
gist.impact: If you rename your GitHub account, your new handle will now correctly sync to your pollinations profile the next time you log in.
gist.visual_concept: Identity and name syncing. Polly the bee updating a name tag or checking a guest list, with the Nomnom creature disposing of the old names.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security badge, carefully writing a new name on a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital clipboard. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of old pixelated name tags. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
